content.text:
All 7 tests pass. The existing general reproduction logic in `nextGeneration` correctly handles the new test case without any implementation changes needed.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes required — existing algorithm already handles reproduction via `count === 3` in `survivesOrIsBorn`
- Result: All 7 tests pass (including the new reproduction test)
- Approach: Freebie — the general neighbor-counting algorithm previously implemented for the blinker and overpopulation tests already satisfies reproduction (a dead cell with exactly 3 live neighbors comes alive)
